name: AI Inventory
summary: Content-first AI/ML discovery — the Tenable AI plugin family plus the software & cpes inventories, plugin output, and network endpoints. Classifies each asset by role, flags exposed/unauth endpoints, maps data-egress (shadow vs sanctioned) and MITRE ATLAS techniques, with a per-row 🔍 Why + false-positive suppression. Tag by role via navi tag-by-query (gated).
